one_liner: LULU at $116.51 is in Wyckoff Phase B with volume drying (0.48x) and a 7% DCF upside — technically constructive but below EMA200 ($118.18) and the DCF margin of safety is thin.

price_action.vol_rank: Well below average — lowest volume session in recent history
price_action.intraday_story: LULU staged a strong +2.54% recovery from a $111.31 low to close at $116.51 near the session high. Volume at 0.48x average is very low — the move was on thin air. Constructive directional close but needs volume to validate.

news_catalyst.headline: No LULU-Specific News Today — Recovering on Consumer Discretionary Sentiment
news_catalyst.summary: No news. LULU is recovering from sector headwinds. The August 27 earnings will be the next major fundamental catalyst. Wyckoff support at $110.13 held today.

technical.summary: LULU is in Phase B accumulation with bullish bias per Wyckoff. The stock is below EMA200 ($118.18) at $116.51 — not yet technically in uptrend. EMA50 ($116.63) is essentially at the current price — a critical pivot level. Close above $118.18 (EMA200) on volume would be the first Sign of Strength. Until then, it's a watch.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Phase B accumulation. The close today at $116.51 is pressing EMA50 ($116.63) and below EMA200 ($118.18). Need a close above EMA200 to confirm accumulation is turning to markup.

valuation.summary: DCF $124.73 vs $116.51 — only 7% upside. Thin margin of safety. Grade B (0.72) fundamentals are solid but the valuation gap is too small to justify accumulate vs watch.

key_strengths: Premium athletic brand with loyal customer base
key_concerns: Below EMA200 — technical downtrend not yet resolved
fundamentals.summary: B grade fundamentals but thin DCF margin and price below EMA200 keep this a watch rather than accumulate.

risks: Close below Wyckoff support at $110.13 would abort the Phase B accumulation
EMA200 at $118.18 is near-term overhead resistance — needs to be reclaimed
